(13:44) Censorship on mass migration policies, major fines against US companies, the DSA as a "censorship tariff" (22:59) AI deepfakes, giving freedom the benefit of the doubt, Biden-era censorship (34:42) Understanding the "Censorship Industrial Complex"...

chunks.text: Jason and Sacks welcome Sarah B. Rogers!
Free speech, EU censorship, OSA/DSA overreach?
Censorship on mass migration policies, major fines against US companies, the DSA as a "censorship tariff"
AI deepfakes, giving freedom the benefit of the doubt, Biden-era censorship
